calendar.matters:
Plaintiff'S Request For A Default Prove-Up Hearing
Off Calendar Nov-30-2017 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514. Judge: Gail Dekreon. Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, Reporter: Mitch L. Lyon, CSR #6840. Telephone: 415-551-3703.

Daniel Riley, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Tenth and Market, LLC, a Delaware Limited Liability Company.
Nina Cook, Property Manager for plaintiff, was placed under oath and testified.
No Appearance by defaulted defendant Yashar Hedayat.
Default was entered against defendant on July 26, 2017.
DOE defendants were dismissed on February 9, 2017.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff Tenth and Market, LLC, a Delaware Limited Liability Company, and against the Defaulted Defendant, Yashar Hedayat, as follows:

Past-Due Rent - $25,500.00.
Holdover Damages - $15,648.64.
Attorney Fees - $825.00.
Costs - $625.00, for a total judgment in the amount of $42,598.64.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.
